author: doll-agent
content:
Done. The strings oracle suite covered case ops, strip variants, and search ops but skipped alignment (center/ljust/rjust/zfill), concat (add/multiply), and regex (match/extract).

Added 8 fixture files pinned to numpy semantics: center (left-bias on odd remainder), ljust/rjust (passthrough on width-smaller), zfill (sign preservation), add (with broadcast and empty composition), multiply (n=0/1/3), match (digit-anywhere and anchored), extract (first capture group with empty fallback).

8 new oracle test functions in tests/oracle.rs.

ferray-strings: 12 -> 20 oracle tests, all passing, clippy clean.
